title: Your First List
description: Learn what lists are and how to create them to organize your farming data.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Welcome back, Qubit! Today we're learning about lists - one of the most powerful tools in programming.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: A list is a collection that holds multiple values together. Instead of having separate variables for each wheat count, you can store them all in one list!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Let's create your first list! Use square brackets [] to create a list. For example: let crops = [1, 2, 3]

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I can put multiple numbers inside the brackets?

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Try creating a list called harvests with at least 3 numbers representing wheat counts.

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Perfect! You've created your first list. Now let's learn how to access individual items.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Each item in a list has an index (position). The first item is at index 0, second at index 1, and so on.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Yes! In programming we count from 0. To access an item, use brackets: myList[0] gets the first item, myList[1] gets the second.

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Great! You can now access any item in your list by its index.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: You can also create an empty list and add items to it later. Just use empty brackets: myList = []

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I can start with nothing and build it up as I farm?

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Exactly! This is perfect for tracking harvests as they happen. Create an empty list now.

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now you know how to create both filled and empty lists. Let's test your knowledge with a farming task!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Let's put theory into practice. Create a list with some initial harvest values, then harvest 2 wheat to see lists in action!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: I'll create a list and do some farming!

objectives.description: Create a list in your code

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Excellent work! You've learned the basics of lists. Next, we'll learn how to add items to your lists!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I can't wait to learn more!
